name: Client Operating Model Phase 5 Build Integration Automation Contracts
outcome_goal: Implement typed integration action and automation contract capture: action inputs/outputs, idempotency, side effects, permissions, webhook/event semantics, rollback classes, observability, and tests.
anti_requirements: Do not stage or commit git changes.
Do not invoke live integration actions.
Do not mark idempotency known without evidence.
Do not regenerate shared docs/API.md, docs/CLI.md, or docs/MCP.md in this parallel chain; Phase 11 owns final shared surface docs.

jobs.label: phase_05_integration_automation_contracts_build
jobs.prompt: Build Phase 5 from artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/packets/phase_05_integration_automation_contracts/PLAN.md. Implement bounded typed contracts for integration actions and automation snapshots: action identity, typed input/output/error envelopes, idempotency status, side effects, retry/replay behavior, permissions/identity references, webhook/event delivery semantics, rollback class, observability/audit requirements, and typed gaps for unknowns. Keep this capture-only; do not execute live actions. Add deterministic tests with fixture contracts. Write artifacts/workflow/client_operating_model/build_reports/phase_05_IMPLEMENTATION.md with changed files, validation, blockers, and Phase 7 simulation dependencies. Do not stage or commit.
